name: business
description: Per-project business-planning pipeline for the ~/dev portfolio: turn a shippable project into a commercial decision and keep it tracked. assess runs a viability triage (repo + vault + MATURITY.md context, structured interview, opt-in --research that reuses a fresh market-research.md or dispatches the cited market-researcher subagent) and writes a schema-versioned business/BUSINESS.md with a verdict (monetize | free-for-reputation | internal-only | park), target audience, and evidence tag; revenue-model turns an assess-passed verdict into a monetization decision (model, pricing hypothesis, channels, numeric dated targets) one choice at a time; market-research runs a standalone deep (full-depth) cited pass — competitors, pricing, TAM/SAM/SOM sizing, trends, positioning gaps, channel norms, demand — and persists it to business/market-research.md for assess and business-plan to reuse; business-plan composes the verdict, monetization, market research, gtm, and metrics plus a short gap interview into a full ten-section business/plan.md (executive summary, market analysis, competitive landscape, product & roadmap, marketing & sales, operations, financial scenarios, risks, milestones), offering missing prerequisites instead of fabricating them; launch produces a go-to-market plan at business/gtm-plan.md in the house checklist format (portfolio-unify-parseable so its progress rolls up like any plan), guarded by the project's MATURITY.md state so it warns before planning a launch for something far from ship-ready; track records actuals into an append-only business/metrics.md (free GitHub metrics auto-collected via collect-github.py, revenue/installs entered manually), diffs them against targets, and bumps the Last reviewed stamp; biz-portfolio sweeps every registry project via the deterministic business-scan.py evidence lane (the SOLE parser of the business artifacts — BUSINESS.md, market-research.md, plan.md, gtm-plan.md, metrics.md — one JSON contract, reusing portfolio-unify's plan-parser regexes for gtm progress) and rebuilds the global-business.md roll-up. A determinism boundary keeps all parsing in business-scan.py so the planning plugin's portfolio and compass skills consume its JSON additively and degrade loudly when the business plugin is absent.
